description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a mix of wood and concrete textures on its exterior. The structure has two stories, with large vertical and horizontal windows providing ample natural light. A prominent feature is the spacious balcony on the upper floor, partially enclosed with a blue railing. The roof is a distinctive asymmetrical shed style, sloping in two directions and creating a dynamic silhouette. The main entryway is recessed, flanked by tall glass panels, and leads to a covered porch area. The rear of the house includes a small overhang and a visible bicycle, suggesting a practical and lived-in space.
description: A modern two-story house with wood and concrete finishes, large windows, an asymmetrical shed roof, and a spacious balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, tall windows, and the covered porch beneath the overhanging roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper-floor balcony with blue railing and the depth of the roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simpler facade with asymmetrically placed windows and the continuation of the wood paneling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a small overhang, two windows, and a bicycle near the back entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical and horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with tall glass panels, covered porch, and minimal decorative elements
